name: Supervisor with Specialists
description: A supervisor/delegation pattern where a supervisor agent classifies incoming requests and delegates to specialist agents (researcher, writer, analyst), then synthesizes the results. Includes both Strands and LangGraph implementations with Terraform for AgentCore deployment.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the supervisor agent

resources.name: AgentCore Endpoint
resources.description: Public endpoint for invoking the agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 5 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: A supervisor agent classifies incoming requests and delegates to specialized agents. Each specialist has its own system prompt and tools. The supervisor synthesizes results. Use this when different request types need fundamentally different handling.

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container
